scripts.clean:publish-artifacts: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const dir of ['bin/Debug', 'bin/Release']) fs.rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @amical/types generate:all && pnpm clean:bin && dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=false -o bin && pnpm clean:publish-artifacts
scripts.build:native: pnpm clean:bin && dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=false -o bin && pnpm clean:publish-artifacts
